# Ruta Pacifico — Complete Information

> Private airport shuttle service from Liberia Airport (LIR) to beaches, resorts, and destinations across Guanacaste and Costa Rica.

## Company Overview

Ruta Pacifico is a licensed and fully insured ground transportation operator based in Liberia, Guanacaste, Costa Rica. The company provides private airport transfers from Daniel Oduber Quirós International Airport (LIR) and point-to-point shuttle service to destinations throughout Costa Rica. All trips are operated by professional bilingual drivers in modern, air-conditioned vehicles.

## Services

### 1. Airport Shuttles (From LIR)

Private pickup at Liberia International Airport (LIR) with direct transport to any destination. The driver tracks your flight in real time and adjusts the pickup time if your flight arrives early or late. The driver meets you at the arrivals exit with a name sign.

Destinations include:
- All beaches in Guanacaste (Tamarindo, Flamingo, Conchal, Papagayo, Nosara, Sámara, Playas del Coco, Las Catalinas, and more)
- Resorts and hotels throughout the province
- La Fortuna / Arenal
- Monteverde
- Manuel Antonio
- San José
- Any other location in Costa Rica

### 2. Inter-Beach Shuttles

Private rides connecting coastal towns within Guanacaste. Available as one-way transfers, round trips, or full-day trips.

Example routes:
- Tamarindo ↔ Flamingo
- Conchal ↔ Nosara
- Papagayo ↔ Sámara
- Any beach-to-beach combination in Guanacaste

### 3. Cross-Country Shuttles

Long-distance private transfers from Guanacaste to other regions of Costa Rica, or between destinations outside Guanacaste.

Example routes:
- Guanacaste → La Fortuna / Arenal
- Guanacaste → Monteverde
- Guanacaste → Manuel Antonio
- Guanacaste → San José
- La Fortuna → Manuel Antonio
- Monteverde → Arenal

## Pricing

- Prices are per vehicle, not per person
- All taxes included (13% VAT)
- No hidden fees — the price shown at booking is final
- Fuel, tolls, and taxes are included
- Pricing varies by route and vehicle size

## Vehicle Fleet

1. **Hyundai Staria** (or similar): 1–6 passengers
2. **Toyota Hiace** (or similar): 7–9 passengers
3. **Maxus V90** (or similar): 10–12 passengers

All vehicles include:
- Air conditioning
- Wi-Fi
- Cold water
- Luggage space

## Popular Routes & Travel Times from LIR

| Destination | Travel Time |
|---|---|
| Tamarindo | ~50 min |
| Flamingo / Conchal | ~1 hr |
| Papagayo Peninsula | ~30 min |
| Nosara / Sámara | ~2 hrs |
| Playas del Coco | ~25 min |
| Las Catalinas | ~1 hr |
| La Fortuna / Arenal | ~3.5 hrs |
| Monteverde | ~3 hrs |

## What's Included in Every Shuttle

- Professional bilingual driver (English & Spanish)
- Real-time flight tracking and pickup adjustment
- Door-to-door service (terminal exit to accommodation entrance)
- Fixed, all-inclusive pricing
- Private vehicle (not shared with other parties)
- Cold water and Wi-Fi on board

## Cancellation Policy

- 48+ hours before pickup: Full refund (minus 13% tax)
- Within 48 hours: Non-refundable
- Free modifications up to 48 hours before pickup (subject to availability)
- Route changes may affect price

## About Liberia Airport (LIR)

Daniel Oduber Quirós International Airport (IATA: LIR) is located in Liberia, Guanacaste, Costa Rica. It is the main gateway to the Pacific coast beaches of northwestern Costa Rica.

Airlines flying to LIR include: United, Delta, American Airlines, JetBlue, Southwest, Air Canada, and others. The airport receives year-round flights from major US and Canadian cities.

LIR is approximately 15 minutes from the city of Liberia.

## About Guanacaste

Guanacaste is Costa Rica's sunniest province, located on the northwestern Pacific coast. Key facts:
- 600+ km of Pacific coastline
- 300+ sunny days per year
- Average temperature: 25–35°C
- 4 national parks
- Known for surfing, sport fishing, diving, and luxury resorts
- Dry season: November to April

## Location & Hours

- Based in: Liberia, Guanacaste, Costa Rica
- Operating hours: 7 days a week, pickups available any hour
- 24/7 bilingual support via WhatsApp
